chapter_title.en: Chapter on Trade, Its Etiquettes, Virtues, and Jurisprudence

text: 3729 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "اَلتَّاجِرُ فَاجِرٌ وَ اَلْفَاجِرُ فِي اَلنَّارِ إِلاَّ مَنْ أَخَذَ اَلْحَقَّ وَ أَعْطَى اَلْحَقَّ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3729 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"The trader is sinful, and the sinful one is in the Fire-except for the one who takes what is right and gives what is right."
